productDisplayName: Nike Men Solid Navy Blue Jerseys
description: CompositionNavy blue T-shirt made of 100% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has a round neck, short raglan sleeves, mesh panels on the back and sides, orange panel around the collar area, orange panel strips on the front and brand logo embroidered on the upper left chestFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowDo not iron or dry cleanPlay better cricket in this athlete-friendly designer T-shirt from nike. The Dri-Fit fabric wicks sweat away to keep you dry and comfortable, while the mesh panels on the sides and back offer superior ventillation. The bright blocks of orange colour adds a stylish edge. Team this with track pants and performance shoes.
